caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a light-colored podium, delivering a speech in an indoor setting. He is wearing a white kurta paired with a light-beige sleeveless Nehru jacket and glasses. His hands are clasped together on the podium in front of him. Two microphones are positioned on the podium, extending toward him. Behind him is a textured, dark green wall with a geometric, recessed pattern and a tall, slender glass vase containing decorative branches. As the sequence progresses, Modi shifts his gaze and head position slightly, moving from looking toward the left side of the frame to facing more directly forward. His facial expression remains composed and focused throughout the sequence. No on-screen text or logos are visible in the scene.
